title: Implement ModularShootAPI.getState(ItemStack)/getPlayerState(Player) utility methods

reference_files.reason: API overview - ModularShootAPI.getState(ItemStack) and getPlayerState(Player) signatures
Read/Write API - getState returns GunState/PlayerState view, usage example

acceptance_criteria: ModularShootAPI.getState(ItemStack gun) static method returns GunState instance for the gun ItemStack
ModularShootAPI.getPlayerState(Player player) static method returns PlayerState instance for the player
getState returns null if ItemStack is not a gun (ModularShootAPI.isGun check)
Both methods are thread-safe (delegate to GunState/PlayerState static factories)
Both methods are consistent with existing ModularShootAPI method patterns (static, utility)
